source_jobs.title: Payments Engineer
source_jobs.description:
TL;DR

The next wave of stablecoin adoption is payments. We're building a stablecoin clearinghouse to make stablecoins move like money, not a trading asset. We're looking for a Payments Engineer who's obsessed with building fast, reliable, better money movement systems.

About Us: we believe stablecoins are better money and will be the backbone of better payments. We see key structural problems hindering stablecoin adoption, and we're going to fix them -- starting with building a clearinghouse. We're a small scrappy team based in NYC, we've raised $10M from a16z Crypto and other excellent partners, and we're here to bring better money to the world.

What You'll Do:

 - Design, build, and scale components of our fiat money movement clearing system.

 - Build integrations with banks, stablecoin issuers, custodians, and other partners.

 - Design and build core product functionality to enable better stablecoin payments products.

 - The dishes.

What We're Looking For:

 - 3+ years of experience building deeply with payment systems, financial infrastructure, and/or banking integrations

 - You've scaled a payment system from 0-1 and ideally also taken it 1-10.

 - Deep understanding of fiat payment rails (ACH, wires, RTP, etc.)

 - Strong fundamentals in distributed systems - you balance shipping quickly with building robust systems that can scale.

 - You thrive in ambiguity - you view a lack of specificity as an opportunity for ownership.

Our Values:

 - Be offended by the status quo - a payment taking 3 days and costing 3% is offensive. Every day that people interact with legacy financial infrastructure costs humanity time and money. Bring the future forward with righteous indignation.

 - Be all over it - operate with extreme urgency and accountability. Know the numbers, meet the right people, answer every email, go the extra mile. Ask yourself: can it be done today?

 - We sell trust - trust is easy to lose. Security and integrity are our foundation. Use every interaction and every product as an opportunity to build trust. This is non-negotiable.

 - Do the dishes - we are all owners. Put ego aside and get shit done.

 - Be the glue - pick each other up and make each other better. Be direct, be helpful, and assume positive intent. Win as a team.

 - We enjoy the crucible! We are on a mission to change money. It takes a lot of optimism to attack such an ambitious goal. Our opportunity is a privilege and we don’t forget that. Especially when the journey is hard.

If these values speak to you, come talk to us!

Benefits:

We're playing the long-game. We think you should too. This means investing in our employees. We offer comprehensive (and growing) benefits, including:

 - Competitive salary and equity

 - Comprehensive insurance (medical/dental/vision)

 - Unlimited vacation: Take time when you need it

 - Periodic off-sites

Equal Opportunity Employment:

The Better Money Company is an equal opportunity employer. We are looking for the best!

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer
source_jobs.description:
TL;DR

The next wave of stablecoin adoption is in payments. We’re building a stablecoin clearinghouse to make stablecoins move like money, not a trading asset. We’re looking for a Forward Deployed Engineer who lives at the boundary between us and our customers. You'll come in earlier than a typical FDE - you'll help define the product surface area of what we build together with our partners. You'll translate customer requests into feedback that guides our product roadmap.

About Us

We believe stablecoins are better money and will be the backbone of better payments. We see key structural problems hindering stablecoin adoption, and we’re going to fix them – starting with building a clearinghouse. We’re a small, scrappy team based in NYC, we’ve raised $10M from a16z Crypto and other excellent partners, and we’re going to bring better money to the world.

What You’ll Do

 - Own the full integration lifecycle with customers and partners—from initial scoping and technical design through implementation, testing, and go-live.

 - Be the connective tissue between our customers and our product. Digest, triage, and scope customer needs into actionable product input that shapes what we build next.

 - Design and build shared tooling, SDKs, and documentation that make integrating with us fast and painless.

 - Debug production issues across system boundaries—when something breaks between us and a partner, you’re the first responder.

 - The dishes.

What We’re Looking For

 - 3+ years of experience building and shipping integrations with payment systems, financial infrastructure, and/or banking partners.

 - You’ve been the person on the other end of the API – you know what good (and bad) integration experiences feel like.

 - Excellent communication skills. You can translate between engineering-speak and customer-speak without losing fidelity.

 - You thrive in ambiguity – you view a lack of specificity as an opportunity for ownership.

 - Preferred but not required to have experience building with stablecoins and/or blockchains.

Our Values

 - Be offended by the status quo - a payment taking 3 days and costing 3% is offensive. Every day that people interact with legacy financial infrastructure costs humanity time and money. Bring the future forward with righteous indignation.

 - Be all over it - operate with extreme urgency and accountability. Know the numbers, meet the right people, answer every email, go the extra mile. Ask yourself: can it be done today?

 - We sell trust - trust is easy to lose. Security and integrity are our foundation. Use every interaction and every product as an opportunity to build trust. This is non-negotiable.

 - Do the dishes - we are all owners. Put ego aside and get shit done.

 - Be the glue - pick each other up and make each other better. Be direct, be helpful, and assume positive intent. Win as a team.

 - We enjoy the crucible! We are on a mission to change money. It takes a lot of optimism to attack such an ambitious goal. Our opportunity is a privilege and we don’t forget that. Especially when the journey is hard.

If these values speak to you, come talk to us!

Benefits:

We're playing the long-game. We think you should too. This means investing in our employees. We offer comprehensive (and growing) benefits, including:

 - Competitive salary and equity

 - Comprehensive insurance (medical/dental/vision)

 - Unlimited vacation: Take time when you need it

 - Periodic off-sites

Equal Opportunity Employment:

The Better Money Company is an equal opportunity employer. We are looking for the best!

source_jobs.title: Head of Compliance
source_jobs.description:
TL;DR

The next wave of stablecoin adoption is payments. We’re building a stablecoin clearinghouse to make stablecoins move like money, not a trading asset. We’re building for the long-term, and that means focusing on compliance from day one. Help us come build out and scale our program.

About Us

We believe stablecoins are better money and will be the backbone of better payments. We see key structural problems hindering stablecoin adoption, and we’re going to fix them – starting with building a clearinghouse. We’re a small, scrappy team based in NYC, we’ve raised $10M from a16z Crypto and other excellent partners, and we’re going to bring better money to the world.

What You’ll Do

 - Build and manage our compliance program, including BSA/AML, KYC, and sanctions screening frameworks

 - Lead money transmitter license (MTL) applications at the state level

 - Develop, maintain, and operationalize compliance policies, procedures, and controls

 - Hire and build out the compliance team over time

 - The dishes.

What We’re Looking For

 - You’ve been the head of compliance or CCO of a licensed money transmitter or bank.

 - You’ve led preparation and filing of MTL applications across multiple states.

 - Strong working knowledge of BSA/AML, KYC/KYB, OFAC, and state money transmission regulations.

 - Familiarity with stablecoin, crypto, or digital asset regulatory landscape is a plus.

 - You are creative and a problem solver. You approach problems with solutions.

Our Values

 - Be offended by the status quo - a payment taking 3 days and costing 3% is offensive. Every day that people interact with legacy financial infrastructure costs humanity time and money. Bring the future forward with righteous indignation.

 - Be all over it - operate with extreme urgency and accountability. Know the numbers, meet the right people, answer every email, go the extra mile. Ask yourself: can it be done today?

 - We sell trust - trust is easy to lose. Security and integrity are our foundation. Use every interaction and every product as an opportunity to build trust. This is non-negotiable.

 - Do the dishes - we are all owners. Put ego aside and get shit done.

If these values speak to you, come talk to us!

We're playing the long-game. We think you should too. This means investing in our employees. We offer comprehensive (and growing) benefits, including:

 - Competitive salary and equity

source_jobs.title: Security Engineer
source_jobs.description:
TL;DR

We sell trust, and security is core to that promise. We're looking for someone to lead how we think about code and operational security as we scale. You'll help design the systems, practices, and safeguards that enable us to grow without compromising on that trust.

About us

We believe stablecoins are better money and will be the backbone of better payments. We see key structural problems hindering stablecoin adoption, and we’re going to fix them – starting with building a clearinghouse. We’re a small, scrappy team based in NYC, we’ve raised $10M from a16z crypto and other excellent partners, and we’re going to bring better money to the world.

What you'll do:

 - Own our security posture across application security, infrastructure security, and operational security.

 - Conduct code reviews, threat modeling, and penetration testing to identify and remediate vulnerabilities.

 - Design and implement security controls, monitoring, and incident response processes appropriate for a regulated payments environment.

 - Establish security policies, procedures, and compliance frameworks (SOC 2, PCI-DSS, etc.) as we scale.

 - Hire, manage, and supervise specialist contractors or future security hires as the team grows.

 - Ship internal security tooling and features. We need someone who can build, not just advise.

 - Work closely with engineering to embed security into our development lifecycle from the start.

What We're Looking For:

 - 5+ years of experience in security engineering, with meaningful time at a payments company, bank, or other regulated financial institution.

 - Experience with cloud environments (GCP) and infrastructure as code providers (Terraform).

 - Breadth across both application/code security and operational security. You don't need to be the world's deepest expert in both, but you need to be knowledgeable in each and capable of hiring and managing those who are.

 - You can write production code, not just review it. Ideally you've shipped internal tools or security features yourself.

 - Experience building security programs at early-stage or high-growth companies, ideally from scratch.

 - Familiarity with compliance frameworks relevant to payments and banking (SOC 2, PCI-DSS, state money transmission, etc.).

 - You view a lack of specificity as an opportunity for ownership.

 - Based in New York City (or willing to relocate).

Our Values

 - Be offended by the status quo - a payment taking 3 days and costing 3% is offensive. Every day that people interact with legacy financial infrastructure costs humanity time and money. Bring the future forward with righteous indignation.

 - Be all over it - operate with extreme urgency and accountability. Know the numbers, meet the right people, answer every email, go the extra mile. Ask yourself: can it be done today?

 - We sell trust - trust is easy to lose. Security and integrity are our foundation. Use every interaction and every product as an opportunity to build trust. This is non-negotiable.

 - Do the dishes - we are all owners. Put ego aside and get shit done.

 - Be the glue - pick each other up and make each other better. Be direct, be helpful, and assume positive intent. Win as a team.

 - We enjoy the crucible! We are on a mission to change money. It takes a lot of optimism to attack such an ambitious goal. Our opportunity is a privilege and we don’t forget that. Especially when the journey is hard.

If these values speak to you, come talk to us!

Benefits:

We're playing the long-game. We think you should too. This means investing in our employees. We offer comprehensive (and growing) benefits, including:

 - Competitive salary and equity

 - Comprehensive insurance (medical/dental/vision)

 - Unlimited vacation: Take time when you need it

 - Periodic off-sites

Equal Opportunity Employment:

The Better Money Company is an equal opportunity employer. We are looking for the best!

source_jobs.title: Senior Platform Engineer (Money Movement Systems)
source_jobs.description:
TL;DR

The next wave of stablecoin adoption is payments. We're building a stablecoin clearinghouse to make stablecoins move like money, not a trading asset. Payments don’t run on trading, but stablecoins currently do, this is unacceptable for traditional payments companies. We're looking for a Senior Platform Engineer who obsesses over correctness/efficiency and likes to get involved across backend/distributed systems. Help us build the systems that help us build faster with confidence by owning and building internal tools, dev infrastructure, and automation.



About Us

We believe stablecoins are better money and will be the backbone of better payments. We see key structural problems hindering stablecoin adoption, and we're going to fix them – starting with building a clearinghouse. We're a small, scrappy team (~10 people) based in NYC, we've raised $10M from a16z crypto and other excellent partners, and we're going to bring better money to the world.



What You'll Do

 - Help shape how we responsibly bring AI-assisted development into core financial infrastructure, without giving up correctness guarantees.

 - Own the test harness for our core systems: integration tests, formal verification, and chaos testing across the ledger, netting algorithm, money movement, and payment ordering.

 - Build correctness guarantees that let the rest of the team ship faster. If we can prove it's right, we can move with confidence.

 - Design and build internal tools that amplify our productivity.

 - Own CI/CD pipelines, dev environments, and deployment infrastructure. Make the path from code to production fast, safe, and boring.

 - Instrument our systems with observability like logging, tracing, alerting, so we catch problems before our customers do.



What We're Looking For

 - 3+ years of experience in platform engineering, developer tooling, infrastructure, or reliability engineering.

 - Expert in GCP or AWS.

 - Comfortable with TypeScript and/or Python.

 - NodeJS or similar runtime environments

 - PostgreSQL or similar RDBMS

 - You've built infrastructure for systems where correctness actually matters: payments, trading, ledgers, or platforms with similar requirements.

 - You reason naturally about state, ordering, idempotency, failure modes, and consistency in distributed systems.

 - Experience with formal verification, property-based testing, or chaos engineering is a big plus, especially if you've spent time with tools like Temporal or TigerBeetle.

 - You have strong opinions about what good internal tooling looks like, and you build it proactively

 - You thrive in ambiguity, viewing a lack of specificity as an opportunity for ownership.



Our Values

 - Be offended by the status quo - a payment taking 3 days and costing 3% is offensive. Every day that people interact with legacy financial infrastructure costs humanity time and money. Bring the future forward with righteous indignation.

 - Be all over it - operate with extreme urgency and accountability. Know the numbers, meet the right people, answer every email, go the extra mile. Ask yourself: can it be done today?

 - We sell trust - trust is easy to lose. Security and integrity are our foundation. Use every interaction and every product as an opportunity to build trust. This is non-negotiable.

 - Do the dishes - we are all owners. Put ego aside and get shit done.

 - Be the glue - pick each other up and make each other better. Be direct, be helpful, and assume positive intent. Win as a team.

 - We enjoy the crucible! We are on a mission to change money. It takes a lot of optimism to attack such an ambitious goal. Our opportunity is a privilege and we don’t forget that. Especially when the journey is hard.



Benefits:

We're playing the long-game. We think you should too. This means investing in our employees. We offer comprehensive (and growing) benefits, including:

 - Competitive salary and equity

 - Comprehensive insurance (medical/dental/vision)

 - Unlimi

notes: Highly technical roles, small team, recent funding
